svg.text: How the bot works with SKILL.md
Step-by-step loop — runs for every user request

g.text: User sends a message to Telegram
Bot sends to AI: [SKILL.md] + [user message] + [previous results]
AI returns EXACTLY ONE JSON action
Bot executes the action via server.py
run_query → SQL to Access DB | insert_data → writes row to Access DB
Bot sends result back to AI: "Step result: AccID=2 — what next?"
SKILL.md tells the AI: table names · column types · workflow steps · access rules
Change database → replace SKILL.md only. Zero code changes.
